engineGuide.h2: Aston Martin Rapide Engine Codes - Full Technical Specifications & Replacement Guide
engineGuide.h3: Every engine code fitted to the Aston Martin Rapide across all generations, with technical specs, compatible variants and trims, known failure points, and average rebuilt prices from UK specialists. Select any engine code to compare quotes.

entries.title: 6.0L Petrol
entries.history: Upgraded 550bhp iteration introduced with the Rapide S facelift, featuring revised mapping and components.
compatibleVariants: Rapide S, Rapide S Q, Rapide S Launch Edition
commonFailures: Timing chain guide wear - plastic guides degrade causing rattle, critical failure risk if ignored
Ignition coil pack failure - individual coil faults cause misfires, labour-intensive V12 replacement
Cam cover gasket oil leaks - external seepage requiring specialist removal for access
entries.cta: Get quotes for AM11 Aston Martin Rapide engine replacement

entries.title: 6.0L Petrol
entries.history: Mid-production revision of the AM11 with incremental reliability improvements for Q specification models.
compatibleVariants: Rapide S Q, Rapide S (late production)
commonFailures: Coil pack degradation - similar to base AM11 but with improved connector design
Oil consumption under hard use - piston ring wear more evident in performance driving
ECU calibration sensitivity - requires specialist matching to preserve Q-spec mapping
entries.cta: Get quotes for AM11/1 Aston Martin Rapide engine replacement

entries.title: 6.0L Petrol
entries.history: Final evolution of the AM11 before AMR, featuring matching numbers emphasis and refined components.
compatibleVariants: Rapide S (final production), Rapide S Matching Numbers
commonFailures: Timing chain tensioner refinement - improved but still requires monitoring beyond 70k miles
High-mileage valve train wear - cam follower fatigue on extensively used examples
Oil leak persistence - gasket materials remain a service item regardless of revision
entries.cta: Get quotes for AM11/2 Aston Martin Rapide engine replacement

entries.title: 6.0L Petrol
entries.history: Ultimate 595bhp naturally aspirated V12 for the limited-run Rapide AMR, representing the pinnacle of the platform.
commonFailures: High-output valve train stress - increased power accelerates component fatigue under hard use
Oil consumption under track conditions - piston ring wear more pronounced in performance driving
Specialist calibration dependency - ECU mapping requires expert matching to preserve AMR character
entries.cta: Get quotes for AMR-V12 Aston Martin Rapide engine replacement

engineGuide.closing: Can't find your engine code? Every rebuilt engine comes with a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty.

commonProblems.h2: Aston Martin Rapide Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Aston Martin Rapide's 6.0L naturally aspirated V12 is a refined but complex unit, with timing chain components, ignition systems and gasket seals representing the most common replacement triggers across AM V12, AM11 and AMR variants. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty.

problems.group: Aston Martin Rapide Timing Chain Guide Failure
problems.h4: Aston Martin Rapide Timing Chain Guide Failure - Why V12 Engines Develop Rattle
problems.affectedModels: Aston Martin Rapide (2010-2012, AM V12), Rapide S (2013-2017, AM11/AM11/1/AM11/2), Rapide AMR (2018-2020, AMR-V12)
problems.rootCause: Plastic timing chain guides degrade with heat cycles and mileage, allowing chain slack that causes rattle and potential jump.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove front cover, replace plastic guides and tensioner, reset timing
repairOptions.longevity: Viable only if caught before chain stretch; prevents catastrophic failure

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Full timing component replacement including chain, guides, tensioners and seals
repairOptions.longevity: Addresses wear across the system; suitable for engines with moderate mileage

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine with upgraded guides, dyno-tested, 12-month warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best value for high-mileage or damaged units; eliminates recurrence risk

problems.recommendation: On a Rapide valued under £40,000 with over 70k miles, a rebuilt engine often represents better long-term value than a preventative chain job. For lower-mileage cars, the intermediate repair can extend life significantly if performed by a V12 specialist.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt AM11 V12 engine prices for your Aston Martin Rapide

problems.group: Aston Martin Rapide Ignition Coil Misfire
problems.h4: Aston Martin Rapide Ignition Coil Misfire - Why V12 Coils Fail Prematurely
problems.affectedModels: All Aston Martin Rapide variants (2010-2020) with AM V12, AM11, AM11/1, AM11/2, AMR-V12 engines
problems.rootCause: Heat exposure and vibration cause coil insulation breakdown, leading to intermittent misfires and rough running.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Diagnose faulty cylinder, replace individual coil pack and spark plug
repairOptions.longevity: Temporary fix; other coils likely to follow on high-mileage V12

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace all 12 ignition coils and spark plugs, reset adaptations
repairOptions.longevity: Addresses systemic wear; recommended for engines over 60k miles

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine with upgraded ignition components, dyno-tested
repairOptions.longevity: Economical when misfires indicate deeper internal wear or compression loss

problems.recommendation: If misfires persist after coil replacement or compression tests show variance, investing in a rebuilt engine often proves more cost-effective than repeated electrical repairs on a complex V12.
problems.cta: Find reconditioned Aston Martin Rapide V12 engines with upgraded ignition systems

problems.h4: Aston Martin Rapide Oil Leak - Why V12 Gaskets Fail and Seep
problems.affectedModels: Aston Martin Rapide (2010-2012), Rapide S (2013-2017), Rapide AMR (2018-2020) - all V12 variants
problems.rootCause: Cam cover gaskets, rear main seals and oil pan gaskets harden with age and heat, allowing external seepage.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Access and replace accessible gaskets (cam covers, valve covers)
repairOptions.longevity: Addresses visible leaks; does not prevent future seal degradation

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove engine components to access rear main seal, oil pan, front seals
repairOptions.longevity: Comprehensive seal renewal; suitable for engines with multiple leak points

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine with all-new gasket set, dyno-tested, warranty
repairOptions.longevity: Best option when leaks indicate internal wear or when car value justifies investment

problems.recommendation: For Rapides over 60k miles with multiple leak points, the labour cost of a major seal overhaul often approaches the value of a rebuilt engine - making replacement the smarter long-term investment.
problems.cta: Get quotes for Aston Martin Rapide V12 engine replacement with new gasket sets

problems.group: Aston Martin Rapide Coolant System Failure
problems.h4: Aston Martin Rapide Coolant System Failure - Why Overheating Risks Exist
problems.affectedModels: All Aston Martin Rapide variants (2010-2020) with V12 engines
problems.rootCause: Plastic coolant expansion tanks develop hairline cracks; water pump impellers wear, reducing flow and causing overheating.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace cracked expansion tank or worn water pump, refill and bleed system
repairOptions.longevity: Addresses single component failure; other cooling components may still degrade

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace tank, pump, hoses, thermostat and pressure test entire system
repairOptions.longevity: Comprehensive approach; recommended for preventative maintenance on high-mileage cars

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt engine if overheating caused head gasket or block damage
repairOptions.longevity: Only option if overheating has caused internal damage; includes new cooling components

problems.recommendation: If overheating has triggered warning lights or caused misfires, assume internal damage has occurred - a rebuilt engine with warranty offers protection that component repairs cannot match.
problems.cta: Compare Aston Martin Rapide V12 replacement engines with cooling system upgrades

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Aston Martin Rapide
finalCta.paragraph: Timing chain rattle, coil misfires, oil leaks and cooling failures represent the most common pathways to expensive repairs on the Rapide's V12. EngineMarket makes it simple to compare prices from trusted UK Aston Martin Rapide specialists who understand these engines. Every rebuilt engine includes upgraded components addressing the original failure point, plus a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty and nationwide delivery. Compare prices today and get back on the road without the main dealer premium.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Aston Martin Rapide Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Aston Martin Rapide and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

engineYears.h2: Aston Martin Rapide Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This section covers all major engine changes across the Aston Martin Rapide's 2010-2020 production timeline, organised so owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt engine prices from UK specialists.

years.description: The Rapide launched with the naturally aspirated 6.0L AM V12 producing 470bhp, paired exclusively with the 6-speed Touchtronic 2 transmission.
keyChanges: Aston Martin Rapide enters production as four-door sports saloon
AM V12 engine code introduced, 470bhp output, naturally aspirated
Launch Edition and standard Rapide variants available
mainEngines: AM V12 - 6.0L petrol (Rapide, Rapide Launch Edition)
knownFor: Smooth, refined V12 character with linear power delivery
Early timing chain tensioner wear documented from 60k miles
Coolant expansion tank cracking on higher-mileage examples
Strong demand for cost-effective replacement solutions among budget-conscious owners
years.cta: Get quotes for 2010-2012 Aston Martin Rapide replacement engines
years.ticker: Rapide V12 timing chain rattle • Rapide engine oil leak repair • 2010 Rapide engine replacement cost

years.description: The Rapide S introduced the upgraded AM11 V12 with 550bhp output and the new 8-speed Touchtronic 3 transmission.
keyChanges: Rapide S replaces base Rapide with 550bhp AM11 engine
Revised ECU calibration and exhaust note for enhanced performance
Interior and exterior styling updates across the range
popularModels: Aston Martin Rapide S Launch Edition
knownFor: Significant power increase to 550bhp with improved throttle response
Plastic timing chain guide wear emerges as dominant failure mode beyond 60k miles
Higher commercial value drives demand for warranty-backed rebuilt units
Transmission compatibility critical - AM11 only fits with Touchtronic 3
years.cta: Get quotes for 2013-2014 Aston Martin Rapide S replacement engines
years.ticker: Rapide S AM11 timing chain replacement • Rapide S V12 misfire repair • 2013 Rapide S engine cost
enquiries: Rapide S AM11 timing chain replacement

years.description: Mid-production revisions introduced AM11/1 and AM11/2 engine codes with incremental reliability improvements and Q specification options.
keyChanges: AM11/1 engine code introduced for Q specification models
AM11/2 code applied to late-production Rapide S with matching-numbers emphasis
Enhanced interior materials and optional carbon ceramic brakes
Final production years before AMR introduction
knownFor: Incremental improvements to coil pack connectors and gasket materials
Matching-numbers engines command premium for investment-grade examples
Timing chain monitoring remains essential regardless of revision
Specialist rebuilders increasingly offer upgraded guide materials
years.cta: Get quotes for 2015-2017 Aston Martin Rapide S replacement engines
years.ticker: Rapide S Q engine replacement • AM11/2 matching numbers engine • Rapide S coil pack failure cost
enquiries: Rapide S coil pack failure cost

years.description: The limited-run Rapide AMR introduced the ultimate 595bhp naturally aspirated V12, representing the pinnacle of the platform.
keyChanges: Rapide AMR launched with 595bhp AMR-V12 engine and final calibration
Lightweight components, carbon fibre details and exclusive interior trim
Production limited to final two model years before platform discontinuation
Matching-numbers and provenance documentation highly valued
mainEngines: AMR-V12 - 6.0L petrol (Rapide AMR, Rapide AMR Ultimate)
knownFor: Highest output naturally aspirated V12 ever fitted to a Rapide
High-performance valve train requires specialist maintenance under hard use
Extreme rarity drives demand for white-glove replacement service
Owners prioritise documented rebuilds and matching-numbers authenticity

faq.h2: Aston Martin Rapide Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does an Aston Martin Rapide engine replacement cost in the UK?
items.answer: Typical rebuilt Aston Martin Rapide V12 engines range from £8,500 for early 470bhp units to £28,000 for AMR 595bhp specifications, supply only. Supply & fit services add £2,500-£4,500 depending on workshop location and variant complexity.
keyPoints: Early Rapide (2010-2012) rebuilt V12: £8,500-£14,500 supply only
Rapide S AM11 (2013-2017) rebuilt V12: £12,000-£19,500 supply only
Rapide AMR (2018-2020) rebuilt V12: £18,000-£28,000 supply only
Supply & fit labour typically adds £2,500-£4,500 to engine price
All EngineMarket suppliers include minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty
items.cta: Compare Aston Martin Rapide engine replacement prices from UK specialists

items.question: What is the most common engine problem on the Aston Martin Rapide?
items.answer: Timing chain guide wear represents the most frequently reported high-cost failure on Aston Martin Rapide V12 engines, typically emerging between 60,000-90,000 miles across AM V12, AM11 and AMR variants.
keyPoints: Plastic timing chain guides degrade with heat cycles and mileage
Rattle or rattling noise on cold start is the primary warning symptom
Ignoring rattle risks chain jump, valve damage and catastrophic failure
Upgraded guide materials available in rebuilt engines prevent recurrence
items.cta: Get quotes for Aston Martin Rapide V12 engines with upgraded timing components

items.question: Is it worth replacing the engine in an early Aston Martin Rapide (2010-2012)?
items.answer: For early Rapides valued under £40,000 with high mileage, a rebuilt engine often represents better long-term value than repeated major repairs, especially when backed by warranty.
keyPoints: Early Rapide market values typically £25,000-£40,000 depending on condition
Rebuilt 470bhp V12 costs £8,500-£14,500 supply only plus fitting
Warranty-backed replacement protects investment versus component repairs
Consider total vehicle condition, service history and intended ownership period
items.cta: Find cost-effective rebuilt engines for early Aston Martin Rapide models

items.question: Can I fit a Rapide S AM11 engine into an early 2010-2012 Rapide?
items.answer: No - the AM11 engine is not directly compatible with early Rapide models due to different ECU calibration, transmission pairing (Touchtronic 3 vs Touchtronic 2) and mounting specifications.
keyPoints: Early Rapide uses AM V12 with Touchtronic 2 six-speed transmission
Rapide S uses AM11 series with Touchtronic 3 eight-speed transmission
ECU, wiring harness and mounting points differ between generations
Always match engine code to your specific variant and production year
items.cta: Verify compatible engine codes for your Aston Martin Rapide variant

items.question: What warranty comes with a rebuilt Aston Martin Rapide engine?
items.answer: All rebuilt Aston Martin Rapide engines supplied through EngineMarket include a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty covering parts and labour at the fitting workshop.
keyPoints: Minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty standard across network
Warranty valid at the workshop that performs the installation
Covers manufacturing defects and component failures under normal use
Always confirm exact terms, exclusions and claim process with your chosen supplier
items.cta: Compare warranty terms for Aston Martin Rapide rebuilt engines

items.question: How long does an Aston Martin Rapide engine replacement take?
items.answer: Typical Aston Martin Rapide V12 replacement requires 5-10 working days from engine delivery to road test, depending on workshop workload and variant complexity.
keyPoints: Engine delivery typically 2-5 working days after order confirmation
Removal and installation requires 3-7 days for V12 specialist workshop
ECU coding, adaptation reset and road test add 1-2 days
Allow buffer for parts sourcing if ancillary components require renewal
items.cta: Find Aston Martin Rapide engine supply & fit specialists with fast turnaround

items.question: Do I need a matching-numbers engine for my Aston Martin Rapide?
items.answer: Matching-numbers engines are essential for investment-grade or collector Rapides, particularly AMR and late-production S models, but optional for daily-driven examples focused on reliability.
keyPoints: Matching-numbers preserves provenance and resale value for collector cars
Non-matching rebuilt engines offer identical performance at lower cost
AMR and Ultimate variants most likely to benefit from matching-numbers specification
Always document engine code and replacement details for future resale
items.cta: Enquire about matching-numbers Aston Martin Rapide engine availability

items.question: What oil specification does the Aston Martin Rapide V12 require?
items.answer: Aston Martin Rapide V12 engines require fully synthetic 0W-40 or 5W-40 oil meeting Aston Martin specification, with capacity approximately 8.5 litres including filter change.
keyPoints: Use only oils meeting Aston Martin factory specification
Typical service interval 10,000 miles or 12 months whichever comes first
Oil consumption under hard use may require top-up between services
Always use genuine or approved oil filters to maintain warranty coverage
items.cta: Find Aston Martin Rapide engine specialists offering full service packages

items.question: Can a misfire on my Aston Martin Rapide be fixed without engine replacement?
items.answer: Many Aston Martin Rapide V12 misfires stem from ignition coil or spark plug failure and can be resolved with component replacement, but persistent misfires may indicate deeper internal issues requiring rebuilt engine consideration.
keyPoints: Single-cylinder misfire often caused by failed ignition coil or plug
Full set of 12 coils costs £2,200-£3,800 fitted by specialist
Compression test recommended if misfires persist after coil replacement
Low compression or metallic noise suggests internal damage requiring rebuild
items.cta: Compare Aston Martin Rapide V12 engines with upgraded ignition systems

items.question: Where can I find a trusted specialist to fit my Aston Martin Rapide engine?
items.answer: EngineMarket connects you with vetted UK Aston Martin specialists trained on Rapide V12 installation, ECU coding and post-fit validation, all offering minimum 12-month warranty coverage.
keyPoints: All network suppliers vetted for Aston Martin technical expertise
Specialists experienced with Rapide V12 removal, installation and commissioning
Nationwide coverage with supply-only or full supply & fit options
Post-installation road test and warranty registration included
items.cta: Find Aston Martin Rapide engine supply & fit specialists near you
